coreIdea: Long-only crypto futures rebound strategy after a sharp liquidation-driven selloff. The strategy watches assets that dropped roughly 10% or more over about 20 minutes, then enters only after signs of reversal: price bounce, rising open interest, and prior long liquidations.
unknowns: Exact candle timeframe for the two green candles is not specified.
Definition of 'fast bounce' is not quantified.
Exact method for identifying the local minimum is not specified.
Exact open interest rise threshold is not specified.
Exact long-liquidation threshold or window is not specified.
Whether the -12% hard stop is measured from initial entry, average entry, or latest entry after averaging is not specified.
Exact sizing of each averaging-down add-on is not specified.
Whether TP1/TP2 are recalculated from average entry after averaging is not specified.

profile.coreIdea: Long-only crypto futures rebound strategy after a sharp liquidation-driven selloff. The strategy watches assets that dropped roughly 10% or more over about 20 minutes, then enters only after signs of reversal: price bounce, rising open interest, and prior long liquidations.
profile.summary: The trader does not buy immediately after a fast dump. If price falls by at least about 10% during the last roughly 20 minutes, the instrument is placed on watch. A long entry is taken only after confirmation that price has begun rebounding from a local low, such as two green candles or a fast bounce, while open interest starts rising again and the selloff was preceded/accompanied by long liquidations. After entry, half the position is taken off at +3.5%, the stop is moved to breakeven, and the remainder is held for +5%. A hard stop is placed around -12%, and any position still open after 180 minutes without hitting TP or SL is closed by time. If price drops another roughly 3% from the latest entry price after entry, the trader may average down only if reversal confirmation appears again, with a maximum of two add-ons.
entryConditions: If price has fallen by approximately 10% or more over the last approximately 20 minutes, place the instrument on watch rather than entering immediately.
Wait for a rebound from the local minimum before entering.
Enter only after confirmation that price has started rising.
Valid price-reversal confirmation examples include two green candles or a fast bounce.
Open interest must start rising again before/at entry confirmation.
There must have been long liquidations before the entry setup.
exitConditions: Take profit 1 at +3.5% from entry; close half of the position there.
After TP1 is reached, move the stop to breakeven.
Take profit 2 for the remaining position at +5% from entry.
Use a hard stop-loss at approximately -12%.
If the position has not reached either take profit or stop-loss within 180 minutes, close the position by time.
Do not enter immediately after the 10% dump; entry requires rebound confirmation.
For averaging down, if price falls approximately 3% from the latest entry price, add only if reversal confirmation appears again.

parameters.name: dumpLookback
parameters.description: Approximate lookback window used to detect the sharp price drop.

parameters.name: dumpThreshold
parameters.description: Minimum approximate price drop over the lookback window required to place the instrument on watch.

parameters.name: greenCandlesConfirmationCount
parameters.description: Example confirmation signal: two green candles indicating price has started rising.

parameters.name: takeProfit1PositionClose
parameters.description: Portion of the position closed at TP1.

parameters.name: takeProfit2
parameters.description: Final take-profit level for the remaining position.

parameters.name: timeExit
parameters.description: Maximum time to hold a position if neither take profit nor stop-loss is reached.

parameters.name: averagingTriggerDrop
parameters.description: Approximate additional drop from the latest entry price that may allow averaging down if reversal confirmation appears again.

parameters.name: maxAddOns
parameters.description: Maximum number of averaging-down additions allowed.

profile.watchLifecycleSummary: When an instrument drops approximately 10% or more over roughly 20 minutes, it is added to a watch state. The strategy then waits for a rebound from the local low with confirmation from price action, rising open interest, and prior long liquidations before entering.
profile.positionManagementSummary: At +3.5%, close half the position and move the stop to breakeven. Hold the remaining half until +5%. If price drops about 3% from the latest entry price after entry, averaging down is allowed only after renewed reversal confirmation, with at most two add-ons total.
profile.riskManagementSummary: Hard stop-loss is approximately -12%. After TP1, stop moves to breakeven. If no TP or SL is reached within 180 minutes, the position is closed by time. Position sizing, leverage, and exact add-on sizing are not specified.
runnerOwnedAuthorities: Position sizing not specified by source
Risk limits beyond the stated stop-loss and time exit
unknowns: Exact candle timeframe for the two green candles is not specified.
Definition of 'fast bounce' is not quantified.
Exact method for identifying the local minimum is not specified.
Exact open interest rise threshold is not specified.
Exact long-liquidation threshold or window is not specified.
Whether the -12% hard stop is measured from initial entry, average entry, or latest entry after averaging is not specified.
Exact sizing of each averaging-down add-on is not specified.
Whether TP1/TP2 are recalculated from average entry after averaging is not specified.
evidence: «если за последние примерно 20 минут цена падает на 10% или больше, я не вхожу сразу, а беру инструмент на наблюдение»
«Вход делаю только после подтверждения: цена начинает расти, например появляются две зелёные свечи или быстрый bounce»
«первый тейк на +3.5% — там фиксирую половину позиции»
«Если за 180 минут позиция не дошла ни до тейка, ни до стопа, закрываю по времени»
«Если после входа цена ещё падает примерно на 3% от последней цены входа, но потом снова появляется подтверждение разворота, могу усредниться»
